title: Syrian Tagine with Charred Tomatoes
description: A flavorful Moroccan-inspired dish featuring charred tomatoes and a blend of Middle Eastern spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the charred tomatoes and cook for 2-3 minutes, until they start to break down.
Add the tagine spice mix and stir to combine.
Add the chopped parsley and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the Syrian tagine warm, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
